nodes.name: 紫冠亞馬遜鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 紫冠亞馬遜鸚鵡（Lilac-crowned amazon，学名 Amazona finschi），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点。
nodes.shortSummary: 紫冠亞馬遜鸚鵡（Amazona finschi），又名淡紫冠亞馬遜鸚鵡或淡紫冠鸚哥，是墨西哥太平洋海岸特有的一種鸚鵡。牠們的羽毛綠色，前額栗色，冠紫藍色。 特徵 紫冠亞馬遜鸚鵡是中等身型的鸚鵡，主要呈綠色。牠們的前額栗色，冠紫藍色，喙呈骨色。外觀有點像紅冠亞馬遜鸚哥，但牠們較為…

links.key: bird-紫冠亞馬遜鸚鵡-458b834a__distributed_in__loc-墨西哥国立自治大学-0156bb50
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The decline in population size has been recorded in almost all of its natural habitat locations. Based on a collection of data and resident accounts, Amazona finschi population range has decreased by 20% due to habitat loss. An increasingly growing population of approximately 100 individuals is found in Southern California, especially in the San Gabriel Valley and Orange Country. {{cite journal |last = Garret |first = Kimball L
